refnamediv.refpurpose: Measure labeled regions in a 3D volume.

listitem.para: Structure array of 3-D region measurements such as volume, centroid, and bounding box.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a structure list with Volume, Centroid, BoundingBox, and VoxelIdxList for each nonzero label.

refsection.title: Examples
